title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 476.330 - Conference shall meet, when
text:
476.330.  Conference shall meet, when. — The conference shall meet on the call of the chief justice. A meeting shall be called at least once every odd-numbered year at some convenient time and place in the state.  It shall be the duty of all members of the conference to attend such meeting.
(L. 1943 p. 514 § 3, A.L. 2014 S.B. 621)
